neighborhoods.name: Palm Bay Downtown / Bayside
neighborhoods.description: Emerging downtown area with Turkey Creek access, community parks, and growing commercial development
neighborhoods.character_notes: The historic and commercial heart of Palm Bay. Most walkable area with best access to cultural attractions, restaurants, and public services.

sources.title: Numbeo Cost of Living Palm Bay

neighborhoods.name: Melbourne / Eau Gallie
neighborhoods.description: Adjacent city with art district, Brevard Zoo, and Indian River Lagoon waterfront

housing.predominantType: Single-family homes, condos, and waterfront properties

neighborhoods.character_notes: Established residential area offering a quieter lifestyle while maintaining reasonable access to Palm Bay's center and services.

sources.title: Numbeo Cost of Living Palm Bay

neighborhoods.name: Southwest Palm Bay
neighborhoods.description: Growing area with newer affordable developments and planned commercial corridors

housing.predominantType: Newer construction homes and affordable housing

neighborhoods.character_notes: More affordable option for budget-conscious retirees. May require a car or longer transit times to reach central amenities.

sources.title: Numbeo Cost of Living Palm Bay

neighborhoods.name: Viera / Suntree
neighborhoods.description: Master-planned communities with Viera Company developments, town center, and family amenities

housing.predominantType: Newer single-family homes and planned community living

neighborhoods.character_notes: Family-friendly area with good schools, parks, and community amenities. Popular with active retirees and families.

sources.title: Numbeo Cost of Living Palm Bay
